Activity Packages

Contact us for custom Oahu tour packages to help make your vacation a breeze. We offer the best ways to experience Oahu with our tours, rentals and a selecti...

Contact us for custom Oahu tour packages to help make your vacation a breeze.

We offer the best ways to experience Oahu with our tours, rentals and a selection of our trusted partners combined. We can also offer plenty of helpful tips that are great for beginners and seasoned travelers alike.

Tell us what kind of experience you want

Choose from our list of activities as well as those of our partners and we can get you a great deal

Give us a call at (808)498-1894 or send us a message on our contact form and we will get back to you with some great options as well as tips to make your Oahu vacation a breeze.

Visit our partner Kayak.com to discover more things to do in Honolulu

More Oahu Adventure Guides

Active Oahu, LLC Wins 2022 Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice Award for Tours and Activities

Laie, Hawaii – July 28, 2022 – Active Oahu, LLC today announced it has been recognized by Tripadvisor as a 2022 Travelers’ Choice award winner for Tours and Activities.  The award celebrates businesses that have received great traveler reviews from travelers around the globe on Tripadvisor over t...

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
